description_long: This sculpture is a stylized bust of a human head, rendered in a pale, stone-like material. The facial features are simplified and geometric, with deep-set eyes, a prominent nose, and a strong jawline. The surface texture varies, with the front and sides appearing smoother while the back of the head shows rougher, more weathered detailing. The ears are minimally defined, and the head sits atop a rectangular plinth that serves as its base. The overall form is monolithic and abstract, evoking early modernist or ancient influences. The coloration is uniform, with a light beige or off-white tone throughout.
description: A stylized, geometric human head bust in pale stone, with simplified features and a rectangular base. The surface is mostly smooth with some rough, weathered areas on the back.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the symmetrical face, deep-set eyes, and strong nose, with the rectangular base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the prominent nose, smooth forehead, and the rougher texture on the back of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back of the head with pronounced rough, weathered surface details and the base.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the defined ear, angular jawline, and the transition from smooth to rough texture toward the back.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
